label: Transparent ostrich feather motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Ostrich transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only an isolated ostrich feather motif on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for transparency removal.
Subject: A refined ostrich feather motif: one large sweeping black-and-white ostrich plume with soft barbs, ivory highlights, charcoal center quill, warm tan grass-toned base detail, accurate feather texture, crisp silhouette edges, and a sophisticated large-scale admin system feel.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full feather silhouette without cropping; no environment, no props, no text.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving black feather depth, white plume highlights, tan savanna-grass neutrals, and precise feather detail.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 only. One uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject; no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no landscape, no other birds, no flowers, no watermark, no text, no random brand names.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 light-mode large-scale admin design-system board for "Morphous Ostrich" / "Ostrich" using the motif of a black and white ostrich feather from an open savanna.
Visual identity: enterprise admin UI, black-and-white ostrich feather contrast, warm tan savanna grass neutrals, ivory feather surfaces, charcoal ink, oat and dry-grass panels, subtle olive grass accent, precise high-density product-system polish.
Required board sections with readable labels: palette tokens, typography with English and Japanese guidance, component library, navigation/sidebar, dashboard analytics with charts, data table, forms and filters, status badges and alerts, command/search, tabs, switches, checkboxes, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture and icon guidance.
UI language: 8px grid, rounded rectangles radius 8px or less, broad feather-bar dividers, black primary admin actions, ivory cards, tan grass active surfaces, compact dense tables, large-scale operations dashboard, muted savanna borders, clearly separated navigation/table/form/status sections.
Text constraints: use clean readable labels only, no random brand names, no watermark, no lorem ipsum, no misspellings; labels should be generic admin UI terms such as Overview, Operations, Queue, Status, Capacity, Table, Revenue, Conversion, Active, Pending.
Palette names visible: Plume Ivory #f7f1e4, Ostrich Black #171613, Feather White #fffdf7, Savanna Tan #c7a66b, Dry Grass #9c8a55, Quill Charcoal #2f2d28, Dust Border #d8c8a7, Grass Olive #6f7651, Alert Clay #b96343, Night Plume #0f0e0c.
Constraints: no bird photo background, no other animals, no generic purple/blue gradient kit, no neon palette, no stock brand logos, no random brand names, no watermark.
